title: WikiHouse
note: Open-source housing system used as a credible decentralized alternative and enabler for federated open plan libraries.

note: Source for open-source, modular, ecological housing and social production concepts.

title: MicroHouse
note: Source for open-source microhouse and local construction equipment concepts relevant to home microfactories.

note: Source for the community and volunteer-coordinated housing model used as a cooperative alternative reference.
